description: Newegg is an e-commerce marketplace. Its developer materials focus on Marketplace seller operations such as inventory, orders, shipping, returns, reports, and related integrations across Newegg.com, NeweggBusiness, and Newegg.ca.
summary: Newegg exposes a seller-focused HTTP Marketplace API authenticated by an API key plus secret key, and a public Newegg MCP endpoint at commerce-api.newegg.com.
